title: Kirk Mcdaniel
compiled_truth: Kirk Mcdaniel is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-10 to 2001-11-27), Kirk Mcdaniel sent 22 and received 47 emails, totalling 69 interactions.
